{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſcho Lauschu nomir-
ſchas Meeſas buhs teem Put-
eim äppaſſch Debbes/ un teem
Swehreem wirs Seimnes par
Barribu / un neweens tohs
odſihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es liſſchu eekſch teem
Bilsfahteein Juha / un Jeru-
leines Eclaſ mittetees to
Zalkfui ta Preeka / un tahs
ibgſintbas Balktni/ta Bruhd-
ana Balkfui/ un tahs Bruhtes
Zalktni / jo ta Seimne taps
ohſta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni Laika / takka tas
UNGGS/ taps tee Kauti to
ehniau no Juha/ un winnu
eelu-Kungu Kauli/ un winnu
reestern Kauli/ un to Prawee-
hu Kauli/ un tee Kauti to Ge-
ihwotaju eekſch Jerusalemes /
o farweem Rappeemi tsmeſti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un taps iſkaifiti preekſch
he Saules / un preekſch ta
nehnes/ un preekſch wiſſa Deb-
es Spehka/ ko tee miylejſchi/
n kani tee kalpojſchi / un kam
e pakkatdsinnutchces/ un ko tee
ekkejſchi / un ko tee irr veeluh-
schi : Tee ne taps fafrahti/
ds aprakti/ tee buhs par Dub-
em Semmes Wirſii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Nahwe taps preekſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ehl fakki uhs teem:
Ta takka tas KUNgs:
Kursch irr / kas friht /
un atkat labpraht ne uszeltohs?
Kurſch irr/ kas atkahpjahs/ un
ne greeschahs atkat atpakkat?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rapehz tad atkahpjahs
fchee Laudis Jerusaleme ar ne-
mittejamu Atkahpschanu ? Tee
turrabs stivri pee Wiltivas / un
leedsahs atkat atgreestees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efimu wehra jehmis un
klansjis/ tee runna to/ kas nepa-
reisi irraid / neweens irr/ kam fa-
wa Blehdiba schehl buhtu/ kas
fazzitu: Ko darru es? Jekatre
atkahpjahs jawā Tezzefchanaā/
ta weens ahtrs Ehrſels Karra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir Stahrks appaſſch Deb-
bes finna jawu Laiku/ un wee-
na Uhbele un Dsehrwe/ un Bes-
deliga nemm jawas Atnahfscha-
nas Laiku wehra / bet manni
Landis ta KUNGA Teefu ne
atsihst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka juhs tad fakkat : Mehs
eſtam gudri/ un ta KUNGA
Baufft-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
